messages.content:
Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.

IBM CICS TX Advanced 10.1, 11.1, and Standard 11.1 is vulnerable to stored cross-site scripting. This vulnerability allows users to embed arbitrary JavaScript code in the Web UI thus altering the intended functionality potentially leading to credentials disclosure within a trusted session.

IBM CICS TX Advanced versions 10.1 and 11.1, along with Standard version 11.1, are affected by a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability. This flaw permits users to inject arbitrary JavaScript into the Web UI, which can modify functionality and may result in unauthorized disclosure of credentials during a trusted session.
